articles.author: Holly  Williams
articles.title: Inside the daring 3-hour operation to rescue a group of tourists from a cliff in Australia - CBS News
articles.description: A group of seven tourists, including three children, became trapped on a cliff when the tide came in during a morning walk on an Australian beach.
articles.content:
A group of tourists became trapped on a cliff along Australia's east coast when the tide came in during their morning walk on a beach.
